title: blechnum inflexum
intro: Blechnum inflexum, also known as the flexible chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum inflexum include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Blechnum inflexum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
